scripts.build: node scripts/with-exclusive-lock.mjs --lock heavy-tasks --label root-build -- env IMAGEN_SKIP_APP_BUILD_DEPS=1 turbo run build
scripts.test: node scripts/with-exclusive-lock.mjs --lock heavy-tasks --label root-test -- env IMAGEN_SKIP_APP_BUILD_DEPS=1 turbo run test
scripts.validate: node scripts/with-exclusive-lock.mjs --lock heavy-tasks --label root-validate -- pnpm run validate:inner
scripts.validate:inner: pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm check:policy
